message:
fix(tui): consume Enter and navigation keys in export modal (#96)

The export modal intercepted QuerySubmitted for Enter, but the key
dispatch maps Enter to DetailOpened. This caused Enter to fall through
to the conversation view, navigating instead of triggering the export.

Also consume SelectionMoved and PageScrolled so Up/Down/PageUp/PageDown
do not scroll the conversation underneath the modal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
